summary: The diff modifies FullscreenOverlay.tsx and GlobeView.tsx along with supporting files. The FullscreenOverlay changes appear to be a refactor/cleanup, but the diff is truncated so it's not fully verifiable. The GlobeView.tsx diff is also truncated and does not clearly show text hiding logic being added. Both requirements remain uncertain but lean toward partial implementation at best.

missing_requirements.requirement: Remove the random/unintended image that appears in full screen mode (inside FullscreenOverlay or related fullscreen components). It should not be rendered at all.
missing_requirements.reason: The FullscreenOverlay.tsx diff is truncated. The visible portion does not show explicit removal of an unintended image element. There is a conditional block that appears cut off where an unintended image may have previously been rendered, but there is no clear evidence the image was removed rather than kept.

missing_requirements.requirement: In global/globe mode, hide the text content rendered inside the GlobeView component to prevent it from conflicting with the top bar (AppHeader).
missing_requirements.reason: The GlobeView.tsx diff is truncated and only shows 3D rendering and scene setup code. No prop, CSS class, conditional rendering, or visibility toggling logic for hiding text or overlay elements inside GlobeView is visible in the diff. The component interface does not show a new prop such as hideText or isGlobalMode that would suppress text content.
